headline: MSCI (MSCI) Stock Looks Undervalued On Cash Flow But Overvalued On Earnings
summary: MSCI stock is sitting in an unusual valuation spot, with the Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate pointing to meaningful upside while market multiples suggest the shares are already priced at a premium, all after a year in which the stock has delivered a modest single digit gain. Over the past 12 months, MSCI has returned 8.2%, which is positive but not a runaway rally that clearly explains the current valuation tension. The partnership with UBS to expand MSCI's AI powered...

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on MSCI, Lowers Price Target to $690
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Jason Haas   maintains MSCI (NYSE:MSCI) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $700 to $690.

headline: Study suggests MSCI's ESG ratings favor stability over frequent updates
summary: A new MIT Sloan School of Management study finds that the ratings investors rely on are quietly optimized for stability by MSCI, the world’s largest ESG ratings provider, and markets miss signals that matter when changes are held back. A new MIT Sloan School of Management study finds that the ratings investors rely on are quietly optimized for stability by MSCI. Researchers found evidence that MSCI’s internal review committees often adjusted scores to keep companies from crossing ESG rating thre

headline: MSCI Analysts Slash Their Forecasts After Q2 Earnings
summary: MSCI (NYSE:MSCI) reported strong Q2 earnings and sales, beating analyst estimates. Share price rose 1.2% to $568.28. Analysts lower price targets.

headline: MSCI-Linked ETF AUM Tops $2.8 Trillion, but Investors Still Sold the Stock
summary: MSCI shares gained after Q2 earnings beat estimates, driven by double-digit revenue growth, record AUM and higher asset-based fees.
